modules.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN t.amount >= 0 AND t.amount < 25 THEN '0-25' WHEN t.amount >= 25 AND t.amount < 100 THEN '25-100' WHEN t.amount >= 100 AND t.amount < 500 THEN '100-500' WHEN t.amount >= 500 AND t.amount < 1000 THEN '500-1000' ELSE '1000+' END AS amount_bucket, COUNT(*) AS txn_count, ROUND(SUM(t.amount), 2) AS total_amount, ROUND(AVG(t.amount), 2) AS avg_amount, t.ifw_effective_date FROM transactions t GROUP BY CASE WHEN t.amount >= 0 AND t.amount < 25 THEN '0-25' WHEN t.amount >= 25 AND t.amount < 100 THEN '25-100' WHEN t.amount >= 100 AND t.amount < 500 THEN '100-500' WHEN t.amount >= 500 AND t.amount < 1000 THEN '500-1000' ELSE '1000+' END, t.ifw_effective_date ORDER BY t.ifw_effective_date, amount_bucket
